name: stock-market-pro
tagline: ClawHub (154★): Yahoo Finance (yfinance) powered stock analysis skill: quotes, fundamentals, ASCII trends, high-resolution charts (RSI/MACD
verdict: Covers quotes, charts, news, and options but never frames WHEN to invoke it — it describes capabilities, not trigger situations — and never states what it's NOT for, so it can misfire against similar finance tools. No version tracking either. Security holds up fine.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' / exclusion / out-of-scope language anywhere in description or body, despite the skill covering a broad, easily-confused surface (quotes, charts, news, options).
No version field in frontmatter, no changelog section, and no dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
Installs a well-known, correctly-spelled PyPI package from the standard registry but pins no version (uses -U/latest) — unpinned well-known package is warning, not fail.
